violations.text: The floor and wall junctures in the prep area does not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

Raw animal foods (beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (sour cream) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Various dressings and coleslaw was observed held at 45-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Prep unit #1 was not in good repair, ambient observed at 45F. PIC called for service at time of inspection. Establishment to not store TCS foods in unit until serviced and reaches an ambient temperature of 41F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the hoods have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026
The wall junctures in the mop sink area does not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

1) The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting 2) The screens on the window above the side prep area in the kitchen was broken/not fully sealed Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The following equipment were observed in poor repair or improper adjustment: 1) The lever for the plug of the sanitizing bay at the three-bay sink had a leak 2) The faucet of the prep sink had a small leak 3) The right handle of the hand sink faucet in the bar area would not turn (could not dispense water) 4) The salad prep unit in the front of the house was not holding adequate ambient temperature 5) The gaskets on the door of a refrigeration unit were broken/frayed New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the ware-washing area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) a low boy freezer unit had an accumulation of ice on the shelves and doors 2) The fan covers in the walk-in cooler had accumulation of dust 3) A window fan had an accumulation of dust New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The food prep sink is lacking an adequate air gap. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 05/27/2024

The following areas of the physical facilities were observed in poor repair: 1) The floor in the back storage area was in poor condition 2) The floor tiles in the bar area were broken New Violation. Correct By: 08/30/2024
